title: linaria dubia
intro: Linaria dubia, also known as Toadflax or Butterscotch, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Linaria dubia include treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as soothing digestive problems and skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, often combined with other herbs for enhanced medicinal effects.
